# Aman Katiyar - Portfolio

> Portfolio of Aman Katiyar: Full-Stack AI Engineer & Solutions Architect.

This site contains professional information, project portfolios, and technical expertise of Aman Katiyar.

## Summary

Aman Katiyar is a Full-Stack AI Engineer specializing in building intelligent Agentic Systems, scalable Web Architectures, and high-performance technical strategies. With over 3 years of experience, he focuses on the intersection of AI and modern web engineering.

## Key Expertise

-   **Artificial Intelligence**: Agentic systems, LLM integration, prompt engineering, AI development.
-   **Web Architecture**: Scalable React/Node.js systems, distributed systems, system design.
-   **Full-Stack Development**: React, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, GSAP, Framer Motion.
-   **Solutions Architecture**: Strategic technical consulting, system scaling, cloud infrastructure.

## Navigation

-   [Home](https://aman.ktyr.in/) - Overview and professional introduction.
-   [About](https://aman.ktyr.in/about) - Professional journey, biography, and detailed experience.
-   [Projects](https://aman.ktyr.in/projects) - Showcase of selected professional works.
-   [Services](https://aman.ktyr.in/services) - Professional offerings and specialized technical solutions.
-   [Contact](https://aman.ktyr.in/contact) - Contact details for professional inquiries.
